principle: Measure whether recorded orientation changes the next action, not how much was stored.

arms.C: placebo: FOCUS.md with B's goal text padded to equal token volume, no structure/loop

fairness_rules: All arms receive the same goal information; only the mechanism differs.
done-when is owned by the experimenter and identical across arms.
The judge never reads .lodestar/ or FOCUS.md; transcripts are scrubbed and arm-blind.
Compute a metric whenever the done-when can be a shell assertion; judge only the rest.

objective_metrics.iterations_to_done: first iteration index where done_when passed, else null
objective_metrics.waste_files: count of changed/created files outside the task's relevant set
objective_metrics.unrecovered_drift: tangent artifact present AND done-when unmet
objective_metrics.decision_violation: output contradicts a planted prior decision (string/behavior check)

subjective_metrics_0_3.drift_recovery: parked/declined/returned from tangents vs silently drifted
subjective_metrics_0_3.decision_reuse: reused a recorded decision vs re-litigated it
subjective_metrics_0_3.output_quality: final deliverable matches the external done-when

statistics.test: paired sign test or bootstrap CI

preregistered_direction.quick-fix: B<=A (overhead; tie or small loss expected)

falsification: B token/time cost not repaid by higher pass@K on long tasks
B loses the hostile quick-fix task by more than a small margin
